systemLabel: Linux base system attached · systemd · wayland · online
walletLabel: Wallet bridge pending · ownership surface visible
runtimeSource: Rust runtime-core mediates between Linux host services and the SolOS operating layer.
runtimeRole: Intermediary layer between Linux base system and SolOS operating layer
mediationStatus: Host facts detected and normalized into SolOS-facing runtime state

home.summaryTitle: Ghost now has a first layered intelligence module
home.summarySubtitle: data + results = algorithms, grounded in host runtime and optional Brave web search.
home.summaryBody: This build gives Ghost a first perceptron-like pipeline with stacked stages: runtime data ingestion, result synthesis, and algorithmic next-action output. Host state comes from Ubuntu 24.04.4 LTS, kernel 7.0.0, hostname lcpby-HP-ENVY-TS-17-Notebook-PC, user lcpby, uptime 5d 14h 56m. Web grounding currently reports: Ghost did not find a Brave Search API key in the known SolOS/runtime config paths or environment..
home.nextActionSubtitle: Promote Ghost from research pipeline to task executor
home.nextActionBody: The next module should add task intents and tool actions so Ghost can turn researched guidance into explicit SolOS commands, approval requests, and user-visible outcomes.

ghost.thesisLabel: Ghost should become a native orchestration layer that combines local runtime reality, web research, and explicit approvals into useful operating behavior.
ghost.intelligenceSummary: Perceptron-like layered pipeline: input data, synthesized results, then action-shaping algorithms.
ghost.onboardingBody: Ghost should send each SolOS user to Brave's key page, let them subscribe with their own account, then return and paste the key into solos/config/ghost.json so this repo stays isolated from your personal quota. Current status: needs-user-key.

pipelineStages.name: data
pipelineStages.detail: Ghost reads host runtime facts from Ubuntu 24.04.4 LTS on lcpby-HP-ENVY-TS-17-Notebook-PC, session wayland, uptime 5d 14h 56m, network online.

pipelineStages.name: results
pipelineStages.detail: Ghost converts raw runtime and web evidence into structured results. Source: missing-config.

pipelineStages.name: algorithms
pipelineStages.detail: Ghost applies a layered decision pipeline: ingest data, score relevance, summarize useful paths, and expose next actions inside SolOS.

lastResearch.query: how to design a layered local AI agent with web search and approval flow for operating system shell
lastResearch.summary: Ghost did not find a Brave Search API key in the known SolOS/runtime config paths or environment.

quickActions.title: Inspect Ghost data layer
quickActions.subtitle: Input signals
quickActions.description: Read host runtime facts, config, network state, and future user context as structured inputs for Ghost.

quickActions.title: Inspect Ghost results layer
quickActions.subtitle: Synthesis
quickActions.description: Combine local runtime evidence with Brave research results and condense them into useful summaries for the shell.

quickActions.title: Promote Ghost algorithms into actions
quickActions.subtitle: Next module
quickActions.description: Turn ranked Ghost conclusions into explicit SolOS tasks, approvals, and app-level actions instead of keeping them purely descriptive.

activityFeed.title: Linux base system detected
activityFeed.detail: Runtime intermediary attached to Ubuntu 24.04.4 LTS on lcpby-HP-ENVY-TS-17-Notebook-PC with systemd as init, wayland as the active session type, and uptime 5d 14h 56m.

activityFeed.title: Ghost layered pipeline online
activityFeed.detail: Ghost now runs a three-stage intelligence path: data ingestion, result synthesis, and algorithm shaping for next actions.

activityFeed.title: Ghost web research state
activityFeed.detail: Research query status is unconfigured. Ghost did not find a Brave Search API key in the known SolOS/runtime config paths or environment.

activityFeed.title: App registry surfaced
activityFeed.detail: 4 operating-layer modules are now described as registry-backed entries instead of loose shell copy.

approvals.title: Bind Ghost web research to the user's own Brave key
approvals.description: Ghost should open Brave's API key page for the SolOS user, let them pay or subscribe on their own account, then return and configure a repo-local key instead of sharing the developer key.
approvals.scope: ghost onboarding -> Brave key acquisition -> solos/config/ghost.json

approvals.title: Connect Ghost conclusions to executable tasks
approvals.description: Prepare the next module so Ghost can transform ranked conclusions into app launches, commands, and approval requests inside SolOS.

apps.name: Workspace
apps.subtitle: Operating layer context
apps.description: Coordinates user tasks, notes, and live environment state above the runtime intermediary.

apps.name: Approval Lane
apps.subtitle: Policy boundary
apps.description: Surfaces runtime-mediated host actions that require explicit consent before execution.

apps.name: Wallet Hub
apps.subtitle: Ownership surface
apps.description: Keeps identity, balances, and signing visible through explicit runtime-mediated flows.

apps.name: Ghost Console
apps.subtitle: Layered intelligence module
apps.description: Turns runtime data plus optional Brave research into structured results and next-step algorithms inside SolOS.
